case_title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO A MUNICIPAL VS CLOYD WILLIAM CABANA CLUB SUNTANNING CTR. INC.

docket_entries.description: SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT CLOYD WILLIAM CABANA CLUB SUNTANNING CTR. INC.

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $853.04 FILED BY CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO A MUNICIPAL CORPORATION, INVESTIGATION DIVISION ROOM 220 AS TO DEFENDANT CLOYD WILLIAM CABANA CLUB SUNTANNING CTR. INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-08-1993 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 03
